use_cases: Toggle between light and dark themes in web applications
Allow users to switch UI color schemes for accessibility preferences
Provide visual theme switching control in dashboards and settings pages
ai_summary: A collection of five animated theme toggle button variants featuring smooth motion transitions using Framer Motion. Each variant offers unique visual styling for light/dark mode switching, with support for layout animations, scale adjustments, and gap customization. The buttons include optional icons like GripHorizontal and RefreshCcw, and transition smoothly between states with morphing effects and hover glow interactions.
